assertions.title: Artifacts appear in workspace as they arrive

steps.expected: brainstorm_artifact and brainstorm_image messages update artifact state
steps.observed: ws.onmessage handles 'brainstorm_artifact' (calls upsertArtifact with filename, content, mimeType 'text/markdown') and 'brainstorm_image' (calls upsertArtifact with filename, data, mimeType 'image/png', label). upsertArtifact calls setArtifacts with a new Map, triggering React re-render.

steps.expected: Workspace panel renders artifact entries from hook state
steps.observed: const artifactList = Array.from(artifacts.entries()) converts the Map to an array. artifactList.map() renders ArtifactRow components for each artifact in the right panel workspace. React re-renders on state change, so artifacts appear in real-time as they arrive.

codeReferences: useGeminiBrainstorm.ts: ws.onmessage handler for 'brainstorm_artifact' and 'brainstorm_image' types
useGeminiBrainstorm.ts: upsertArtifact callback uses setArtifacts with new Map(prev).set(filename, artifact)
BrainstormPage.tsx: const artifactList = Array.from(artifacts.entries())
BrainstormPage.tsx: artifactList.map(([filename, artifact]) => <ArtifactRow .../>)

assertions.title: Markdown files render inline via react-markdown

steps.action: Verify ArtifactPreview uses ReactMarkdown for non-image artifacts
steps.expected: Markdown content is rendered via ReactMarkdown component
steps.observed: ArtifactPreview checks if artifact.mimeType === 'image/png'; for non-image artifacts, renders <ReactMarkdown>{artifact.content}</ReactMarkdown> inside a styled div with prose-invert classes for dark theme formatting.

codeReferences: BrainstormPage.tsx line 2: import ReactMarkdown from 'react-markdown'
BrainstormPage.tsx ArtifactPreview: <ReactMarkdown>{artifact.content}</ReactMarkdown> with prose-invert styling
package.json: "react-markdown": "^10.1.0"

assertions.title: Images display inline as base64 data URIs

steps.action: Verify ArtifactPreview renders images as base64 data URIs
steps.observed: ArtifactPreview checks artifact.mimeType === 'image/png', then renders:

steps.action: Verify hook stores base64 data from WebSocket message
steps.expected: brainstorm_image handler stores raw base64 string
steps.observed: useGeminiBrainstorm.ts onmessage: for type 'brainstorm_image', calls upsertArtifact with content: data.data (base64 string from server), mimeType: 'image/png'

codeReferences: BrainstormPage.tsx ArtifactPreview:
useGeminiBrainstorm.ts: upsertArtifact(data.filename, { content: data.data, mimeType: 'image/png', ... })

steps.action: Verify downloadSingleArtifact function creates Blob from state
steps.expected: Function creates Blob from artifact content without server request
steps.observed: downloadSingleArtifact: for images, decodes base64 via atob(), creates Uint8Array, creates Blob([bytes], { type: artifact.mimeType }). For text, creates Blob([artifact.content], { type: artifact.mimeType }).

steps.action: Verify downloadBlob triggers anchor click download
steps.expected: Creates object URL and triggers download via anchor element
steps.observed: downloadBlob: URL.createObjectURL(blob), creates <a> element, sets a.href = url, a.download = filename, appends to body, calls a.click(), removes element, revokes URL. Entirely client-side.

steps.action: Verify download button in ArtifactRow uses this function
steps.expected: ArtifactRow has download button calling downloadSingleArtifact
steps.observed: ArtifactRow renders a button with onClick: (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); downloadSingleArtifact(artifact) } — triggers individual download.

codeReferences: BrainstormPage.tsx downloadSingleArtifact: creates Blob from atob()/Uint8Array (images) or Blob([content]) (text)
BrainstormPage.tsx downloadBlob: URL.createObjectURL → <a>.download → click → revokeObjectURL
BrainstormPage.tsx ArtifactRow: download button onClick calls downloadSingleArtifact(artifact)

assertions.title: Download All creates zip via JSZip client-side

steps.expected: Creates zip from all artifacts, generates blob, triggers download
steps.observed: downloadAllArtifacts: creates new JSZip(), iterates all artifacts from Map, adds each via zip.file(filename, ...) — binary Uint8Array for images (decoded from base64 via atob), raw text for others. Generates blob via zip.generateAsync({ type: 'blob' }), triggers download via downloadBlob(blob, 'brainstorm-artifacts.zip').

steps.action: Verify Download All button wired to this function
steps.expected: Button calls downloadAllArtifacts with artifacts Map
steps.observed: Bottom of workspace panel: <button onClick={() => downloadAllArtifacts(artifacts)}>Download All ({artifactList.length} files)</button> — rendered when artifactList.length > 0.

codeReferences: BrainstormPage.tsx line 3: import JSZip from 'jszip'
BrainstormPage.tsx downloadAllArtifacts: new JSZip(), zip.file() for each artifact, zip.generateAsync({ type: 'blob' }), downloadBlob(blob, 'brainstorm-artifacts.zip')
BrainstormPage.tsx: Download All button onClick={() => downloadAllArtifacts(artifacts)}
package.json: "jszip": "^3.10.1"

assertions.title: Flash Lite activity spinner visible during generation

steps.action: Verify isGenerating state management in hook
steps.expected: isGenerating set true on tool_call, false on artifact arrival
steps.observed: useGeminiBrainstorm.ts: const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false). In ws.onmessage: 'tool_call' type → setIsGenerating(true); 'brainstorm_artifact' and 'brainstorm_image' types → setIsGenerating(false). Also reset to false in stop().

steps.action: Verify ActivitySpinner component exists and is rendered conditionally
steps.expected: Spinner UI shown when isGenerating is true
steps.observed:
ActivitySpinner component renders a spinning SVG (animate-spin class) with 'Generating artifact…' text in an indigo-styled pill. In BrainstormPage: {isGenerating && (
)} — shown in workspace panel between the warning banner and the file list.

codeReferences: useGeminiBrainstorm.ts: setIsGenerating(true) on 'tool_call', setIsGenerating(false) on 'brainstorm_artifact'/'brainstorm_image'
BrainstormPage.tsx ActivitySpinner: SVG with animate-spin class + 'Generating artifact…' text
BrainstormPage.tsx: {isGenerating && <ActivitySpinner />} conditional render in workspace panel

assertions.title: File count and total size indicator displayed

steps.expected: File count and total size computed from artifacts
steps.observed: const artifactList = Array.from(artifacts.entries()); const totalSize = artifactList.reduce((acc, [, artifact]) => acc + getArtifactSize(artifact), 0). getArtifactSize: for images, calculates real binary size as Math.floor(content.length * 3 / 4); for text, uses new Blob([content]).size.

steps.action: Verify stats display in workspace header
steps.expected: File count and formatted size shown in workspace panel header
steps.observed: In workspace header div: {artifactList.length > 0 && ({artifactList.length} {artifactList.length === 1 ? 'file' : 'files'} · {formatFileSize(totalSize)})}. formatFileSize: converts bytes to 'B', 'KB', or 'MB' with 1 decimal place.

codeReferences: BrainstormPage.tsx: artifactList.length for file count, totalSize via reduce + getArtifactSize
BrainstormPage.tsx: formatFileSize helper converts bytes to human-readable B/KB/MB
BrainstormPage.tsx workspace header: '{count} files · {size}' display, conditionally shown when artifacts > 0

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed. All artifact workspace panel features are correctly implemented — real-time artifact rendering from hook state (FE-AW-01), ReactMarkdown for .md files (FE-AW-02), base64 data URI img tags for images (FE-AW-03), client-side Blob+anchor download for individual files (FE-AW-04), JSZip-based Download All (FE-AW-05), conditional ActivitySpinner tied to isGenerating state (FE-AW-06), and file count + size stats in workspace header (FE-AW-07).
